suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-07-23. CVE-2026-44891, CVE-2026-55831, and CVE-2026-55833 apply to Netty versions before 4.1.136.Final and 4.2.16.Final. This repo now sets netty.version to 4.2.16.Final in build.gradle, which is the fixed 4.2.x release according to the CVE descriptions and Netty release notes. Dependency-Check is still reporting these CVEs because the current NVD CPE configuration includes 4.2.16. Keep this suppression only for the already-fixed Netty 4.2.16.Final artifacts until NVD/Dependency-Check metadata catches up or a newer fixed 4.2.x release is available.
